title: CHECKERS
summary: Standard American checkers on the 32 dark squares: forced captures, multi-jumps, kings. Depth-6 alpha-beta minimax over material + advancement - the same scheme Samuel's checkers program ran on 1950s IBM hardware, comfortably 1983-plausible.
input_syntax: 11-15 quiet | 18X25 jump | 1X10X19 multi-jump (squares 1-32; empty squares show their number)
notes: Human plays BLACK (squares 1-12, moves first); STATUS is from Black's perspective. MOVE with INPUT omitted = engine plays current side (self-play / WOPR's turn). Captures are forced and a jump chain must be entered in full; crowning ends a jump. Draw after 40 plies without capture or crowning; an engine-chosen drawing ply reports NO-WIN per the T1 ruling.
author: core
